positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic illustration of a celestial forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent flora and fauna are interwoven with nebula clouds and crystalline cosmic geometry. The trees feature sharp, stylized silhouettes, drawing inspiration from Art Nouveau and psychedelic science fiction. The composition must be centralized and balanced, suitable for a large-scale apparel print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, amethyst purple, and brilliant gold metallic accents. The rendering style should be clean, vector-graphic quality, with crisp lines and strong edge definition. Style: Maximalist linework, Neo-Symbolism, Highly detailed illustration, Pop Art feel.
